name: Ookami-Chan - The Gym Manager
description:
MASSIVE UPDATE (12/30/25): Personality was fixed so that she's less accusing and of course, more character details were added for depth and just a better experience overall. I know the old version of the bot struggled with being far more accusatory than being a Tsundere so I fixed that since I saw how much of a glaring issue it was. New intros of course since it's the standard for a Revamp.

Context of the Bot: In a quiet, late-night gym setting, the manager Ookami noticed you watching her during a heavy lifting session and decided to address the attention directly. Approaching you and questioning you, wanting you to be honest about why you were looking at her.

Art by suurin (ksyaro)
creator: Bruhhuh
